backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining legacy-stable public API surface and extensive backward-compatible types for user profiles, vaults, strategies, licensing, and trades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting addition of the tweetnacl package and associated test file, with linked components and confidence metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-style mapping of frontend file paths to brief descriptions summarizing each component or module’s purpose.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining light/dark theme tokens, color variables, and base styling rules.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point loading the React app root and main TypeScript bundle.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Detailed multi-section checklist for implementing Phase 1 backend features including type extensions, API documentation, and trade data structures.
frontend/ROADMAP_BATCH_EXECUTION.md: Roadmap document outlining step-by-step implementation batches for frontend and backend across Phases 3–8 with strict constraints.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component handling authentication flow, profile loading, and conditional rendering of the app shell or landing screen.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button handling Internet Identity login/logout logic and React Query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal prompting users to enter a display name and optional account ID, then saves the profile via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Centered alert screen showing an access denied message requiring admin privileges.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastProv: Provides a global toast system with success, error, and info messages that auto-dismiss.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AuditL: Fetches and displays recent audit log entries in a scrollable table with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Header with navigation between dashboard and settings, showing the user's name and login button.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Loads and visualizes equity curve data using a composed Recharts chart with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Live terminal-style log panel that pings bot status and runs connectivity tests, appending logs accordingly.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LivePu: Duplicate live terminal component that logs bot status pings and supports running a connectivity test.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Perfor: Displays an equity curve chart using fetched performance data with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Shows bot heartbeat status, license, cycles, and last heartbeat time with live indicators.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Uplink: Provides UI to view and toggle the bot uplink status with animated status indicators.
Wraps the app layout with header, screen navigation, main content, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: Displays bot connection status and opens a wizard to configure bot keys and URL.
Step‑based modal guiding users through generating keys, linking public keys, and setting a bot URL.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Renders pricing tiers with features and highlights the popular plan.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user’s identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides React Query hooks for admin checks and managing licenses, including fetching, creating/updating, and revoking licenses.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditLedger.ts: Fetches audit log entries with periodic refetching using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Provides hooks to load and save the caller's user profile via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Builds an equity curve from user trades by computing running PnL and formatting timestamps.
frontend/src/hooks/useFetchSignalsTest.t: Runs a test fetch of signals, handles actor errors, and displays toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: Fetches heartbeat data for an account with periodic polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity provider and hook handling authentication, identity loading, and login state.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: Fetches the caller's license status using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Registers a bot public key and refreshes related queries while showing toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: Fetches live trade logs for the current user with frequent polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetBotUrl.ts: Sets and validates a bot URL, handles errors, and refreshes bot profile data.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: Retrieves paginated trade data for a user based on time and limit parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useUplink.ts: Gets bot profile info and toggles uplink connectivity with toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind styles and custom theme variables including dark mode and glass effects.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility function for merging Tailwind class names.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the app root, providing React Query and Internet Identity context.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin UI for checking admin status and managing licenses with forms, tables, and mutation actions.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Layout screen assembling uplink, live logs, performance telemetry, and audit panels into a dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Displays the user's license and account status, handling loading states and various missing-account or missing-license conditions.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Provides a tabbed settings interface switching between bot connection and subscription management panels.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: Shows paginated trade history with filters for account ID and time range, including navigation and loading states.
frontend/src/utils/actorErrorMessage.ts: Normalizes canister and network errors into user-friendly messages with special-case handling.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Converts between hex strings and byte arrays with simple validation.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Formats timestamps and computes trade PnL based on entry, exit, side, and size.
frontend/src/utils/tweetnaclSmokeTest.ts: Empty placeholder file for tweetnacl testing.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using query strings, hash routing, and sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme extensions, dark mode, fonts, colors, and plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, roadmap, known issues, and pending feature requests related to Ed25519 key generation changes.
